caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in front of a professional microphone. The t-shirt features white text that reads "I'V NEVER D" and "SUMT" with "AT W" visible below. He is positioned in a room filled with framed photographs on the walls and a clothing rack with garments in the background. A white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt stands behind him. The scene is branded with two logos: a circular black and white logo on the left that says "SURE" and a red and white logo on the right that reads "SURELY TOT". Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking into the microphone with slight changes in his facial expression and head tilt, while the background elements and equipment remain static.
